name: HRC_SEM_JOB_AUTO_SUG_VL
query: select REQUISITION_TITLE as LOV, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER from HRC_SEM_JOBS where REQUISITION_TITLE is not null union select JOB_FAMILY_NAME as LOV, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER from HRC_SEM_JOBS where JOB_FAMILY_NAME is not null union select LOCATION_FQN as LOV, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER from HRC_SEM_JOBS where LOCATION_FQN is not null
